ddls:
CREATE TABLE "trains" (
  "train_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the train */,
  "train_number" TEXT /* Train number (e.g., G2669) */,
  "train_type" TEXT /* Type of train (e.g., High-Speed, Local) */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Seating capacity of the train */,
  "operational_status" TEXT /* Operational status of the train (e.g., active, inactive, under_maintenance) */,
  "manufacturing_date" TEXT /* Manufacturing date of the train */,
  "retirement_date" TEXT /* Retirement date of the train */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("train_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stations" (
  "station_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the station */,
  "station_name" TEXT /* Name of the station (e.g., Huangshan North) */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the station */,
  "facilities" TEXT /* Facilities available at the station (e.g., restrooms, waiting areas) */,
  "station_code" TEXT /* Unique code for the station (e.g., HSN) */,
  "address" TEXT /* Detailed address of the station */,
  "contact_number" TEXT /* Contact number of the station */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "schedules" (
  "schedule_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the schedule entry */,
  "train_id" INTEGER /* ID of the train associated with the schedule */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* ID of the station where the train stops */,
  "arrives" TEXT /* Arrival time at the station */,
  "departs" TEXT /* Departure time from the station */,
  "duration" TEXT /* Duration of the stop at the station */,
  "route_id" INTEGER /* ID of the route associated with the schedule */,
  "journey_type" TEXT /* Type of journey (e.g., one-way, round trip) */,
  "schedule_status" TEXT /* Status of the schedule (e.g., active, cancelled, delayed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("schedule_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_schedules_train_id FOREIGN KEY ("train_id") REFERENCES trains ("train_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_schedules_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES stations ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "train_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the train type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the train type (e.g., High-Speed, Local) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the train type */,
  "description_long" TEXT /* Detailed description of the train type */,
  "max_speed" INTEGER /* Maximum speed of the train type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "train_capacity" (
  "capacity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the capacity record */,
  "train_id" INTEGER /* ID of the train */,
  "first_class_capacity" INTEGER /* Seating capacity in first class */,
  "second_class_capacity" INTEGER /* Seating capacity in second class */,
  "third_class_capacity" INTEGER /* Seating capacity in third class */,
  "total_capacity" INTEGER /* Total seating capacity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("capacity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_train_capacity_train_id FOREIGN KEY ("train_id") REFERENCES trains ("train_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "departures" (
  "departure_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the departure record */,
  "schedule_id" INTEGER /* ID of the schedule record */,
  "actual_departure" TEXT /* Actual departure time from the station */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the departure (e.g., On Time, Delayed) */,
  "actual_schedule_time" TEXT /* Actual schedule time of the departure */,
  "delay_reason" TEXT /* Reason for any delay */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("departure_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_departures_schedule_id FOREIGN KEY ("schedule_id") REFERENCES schedules ("schedule_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "arrivals" (
  "arrival_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the arrival record */,
  "schedule_id" INTEGER /* ID of the schedule record */,
  "actual_arrival" TEXT /* Actual arrival time at the station */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the arrival (e.g., On Time, Delayed) */,
  "actual_schedule_time" TEXT /* Actual schedule time of the arrival */,
  "delay_reason" TEXT /* Reason for any delay */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("arrival_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_arrivals_schedule_id FOREIGN KEY ("schedule_id") REFERENCES schedules ("schedule_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., Train Operator, Station Manager) */,
  "full_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user receiving the notification */,
  "message" TEXT /* Message content of the notification */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date when the notification was sent */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of notification (e.g., schedule change, delay, cancellation) */,
  "read_status" TEXT /* Status of the notification (e.g., read, unread) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analytics" (
  "analytics_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the analytics record */,
  "train_id" INTEGER /* ID of the train related to the analytics */,
  "total_routes" INTEGER /* Total number of routes taken by the train */,
  "on_time_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of on-time departures */,
  "average_delay" REAL /* Average delay in minutes */,
  "average_speed" REAL /* Average speed of the train */,
  "total_revenue" REAL /* Total revenue generated by the train */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analytics_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_train_id FOREIGN KEY ("train_id") REFERENCES trains ("train_id")
)
